web.description: Discover 7200 Collins Miami Beach Residences. Explore spacious floor plans, resort-style amenities, and short-term rental options.
web.markdown:
# 7200 Collins Miami Beach

Luxury Living Meets Smart Investment

[Download Floor Plans & Pricing](https://7200collinsmiamicondo.com/#contact)

## **Short-Term Rentals Allowed at 7200 Collins**

- **Airbnb-friendly**: 7200 Collins allows flexible short-term rentals with no rental restrictions. Rent daily, weekly, or monthly. Enjoy the residence during your vacation and rent it out the rest of the year to generate income in USD.

- **Multi-platform freedom**: Owners can list their units on Airbnb, VRBO, Vacasa, and others. The building also offers in-house its own rental management services to handle everything on your behalf.

- **High ROI Potential:** With strong demand for short-term rentals in Miami Beach, units at 7200 Collins offer attractive income-generating potential in USD.
- **Ready to rent**: Each unit comes fully furnished with a smart, rental-optimized layout — ideal for investors and part-time residents.


[Download Floor Plans & Pricing](https://7200collinsmiamicondo.com/#contact)

## **Short-Term Rentals Allowed at 7200 Collins**

[View full photo gallery of 7200 Collins](https://7200collinsmiamicondo.com/gallery/)

## **Unbeatable Location in the Heart of North Beach, Miami**

Located at 7200 Collins Ave, 7200 Collins offers a prime address within the newly designated Town Center district of North Beach — one of Miami’s most promising and walkable neighborhoods. This thriving area combines residential charm with urban convenience, making it ideal for both living and investing.

- **Steps from the Beach**

Walk to the sand in minutes and enjoy Miami Beach’s laid-back coastal lifestyle every day.

- **Quick Access to Key Destinations**
  - **Bal Harbour Shops** – 7 minutes

  - **Aventura Mall** – 15 minutes

  - **South Beach** – 12 minutes

  - **Brickell** – 20 minutes

  - **Miami International Airport** – 20 minutes

  - **Wynwood Arts District** – 20 minutes
- **Everything Within Reach**

From high-end shopping and fine dining to nightlife and business hubs, 7200  Collins connects you to it all — effortlessly.

- **Perfect for Locals & Visitors Alike**

The central location attracts both seasonal renters and long-term residents, enhancing rental demand and occupancy rates.


[Download Floor Plans & Pricing](https://7200collinsmiamicondo.com/#contact)

## **About the Team Behind 7200 Collins**

**Amicon: Building Trust Through Experience**

With more than 25 years of experience in high-end development, **Amicon** brings a client-first philosophy to every stage of the construction process. Known for their strategic insight and hands-on project leadership, the firm unites experts across multiple disciplines to deliver smart, tailored solutions. Amicon’s reputation is built on consistency, integrity, and a deep understanding of how to create long-term value — not just for the property, but for the people who live and invest in it.

**Revuelta Architecture: Design with Purpose and Vision**

The architectural vision of 7200 Collins is led by **Revuelta Architecture International**, a Miami-based firm with a global portfolio of award-winning projects. For over two decades, Revuelta has been shaping South Florida’s skyline with bold yet functional architecture. Their commitment to sustainability, historic preservation, and timeless aesthetics has made them a trusted partner among elite developers. From luxury residences to landmark commercial spaces, their work combines innovation with a strong sense of place — an approach clearly reflected in the design of 7200 Collins.

[Download Floor Plans & Pricing](https://7200collinsmiamicondo.com/#contact)

# 7200 Collins

### **North Beach / 2028**

12 Stories / 222 Residences of
Studios to 2 Bedrooms

**7200 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33141, USA**

Average Price: $1,700 x SF ($18,299 x M2)

7200 Collins is a premier luxury residence located at Collins Avenue and 72nd Street, in the newly revitalized Town Center of North Beach, Miami. This exclusive development offers a refined coastal lifestyle with resort-style amenities including on-site and valet parking with a porte cochère, a grand lobby with concierge and reception, the private 7200 Collins Beach Club, landscaped gardens, a resort-style pool, alfresco dining and BBQ areas, a library lounge, fitness and wellness center, yoga and meditation terrace, and a private owners’ lounge. But the true highlight is its unbeatable location—North Beach offers a vibrant yet relaxed neighborhood feel, blending high-quality living with an eclectic, authentic Miami experience.

This project is currently in under construction and prices start at $550,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/7200collins/#contactform) for more information.

60% At Closing \| Q1 2028



## Features

### Building Features

- Curated retail with on-site food and beverage
- Three levels of bespoke amenities
- Furnished residences curated by Adriana Hoyos Design Studio
- On-site parking
- Grand Lobby
- Lounge
- Concierge and reception desk
- 7200 Collins Beach Club
- Valet parking with Porte Cochère
- Package and delivery room
- Bicycle storage
- On-site management offices
- Resort-style pool
- Library lounge
- Landscaped gardens
- Alfresco dining and BBQ area
- State-of-the-art fitness center
- Private owners' lounge and breezeway
- Yoga and meditation terrace
- Resort-style pool with city views
- Landscaped sundeck with self-service bar
- Landscape rooftop with sundeck
- Zen walkway
- Outdoor game terrace
- Outdoor cinema
- Indoor game lounge

### Residence Features

- Fully furnished residences, curated by Adriana Hoyos Design Studio
- Unobstructed ocean and city views in select residences
- 9-foot ceilings in living rooms and bedrooms
- Elegant, glazed porcelain tiled flooring throughout, offering a sophisticated, durable finish
- Private terraces in every residence, seamlessly connected by sliding glass doors
- Spacious, thoughtfully designed and finished closets with ample storage space
- In-unit Bosch Energy Star® stackable washer and dryer
- Italian inspired custom kitchen cabinetry designed by Italkraft with sleek and modern slab countertops
- Sleek and modern slab countertops and matching backsplash
- Grohe brass sink faucets with stainless steel undermount sink
- Bosch refrigerators and dishwashers
- Bosch 4-burner cooktop with speed oven and hood
- Italian inspired custom bathroom cabinetry designed by Italkraft with sleek and modern slab countertops
- Large-format glazed porcelain tiled floors, and ceramic tile in showers
- Grohe sink faucets, with vanity sink basins, and Grohe dual flush toilets
- Bathtubs in select units with brass fixtures
- Fully tiled showers with glass enclosure and Grohe brass finished showerheads

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/18-7200-Collins-Pool.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Developer-7200-collins.jpg)

Northlink Capital focuses on building and acquiring diverse property types. Leveraging deep industry knowledge, it undertakes innovative projects across the market. Headquartered in NYC, Northlink owns office, retail, and residential properties across North America. With 20 years in real estate and a role at Hampshire Properties since 2003, he has helped manage, fund, and acquire a portfolio worth over $2 billion.
